text: Everything here feels slightly surreal. The sharp angles and geometric glass give the space a sense of sterile anticipation. As I step through, the world brightens with color and ideas: the wall shouts of research and development, with words and screens inviting curiosity. I feel attentive, my mind stretching—caught between the cold logic of modern architecture and the creative energy woven into this exhibition. There is a quiet excitement within me, anticipating what new perspectives or questions the displays may provoke.
